concerns.text: SC-006 states 'of knots with computable invariants have all invariants populated' - missing the percentage threshold value. Without a specific coverage target (e.g., '≥95%'), this criterion cannot be verified as met or not.

SC-012 states 'achieves match threshold for pass/fail status' and 'reference coverage of dataset' - both phrases contain missing percentage values. Without explicit thresholds, algorithm validation pass/fail cannot be determined.
Acceptance scenario states 'of records have crossing number, braid index, and hyperbolic volume values present (no nulls in required invariant fields)' - missing the required coverage percentage.

SC-005 describes exponential backoff as '(→ → →... → max)' which is unclear notation. Should specify the actual multiplier sequence (e.g., 'initial → 2×initial → 4×initial → max'). This is recoverable with minor clarification.
